title: Monday forms and Conversion Events for tracking
excerpt: Is there a way to set up a Monday.com form submission as a conversion event, so I’m able to use form submissions with platforms such as Google analytics, and ads?

posts.author: Lozzalingo (Laurence)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to set up a Monday.com form submission as a conversion event, so I’m able to use form submissions with platforms such as Google analytics, and ads?

posts.author: InsulationGod (Joshua Friddle)
posts.cookedHtml: Did you ever find out how to do this?

posts.author: OfficeHounds (Maggie Langley)
posts.cookedHtml: You can have the Monday form redirect to a Thank You page on your website. In the form settings, just add the redirect link. Then everytime someone visits the Thank You page for that specific form, that will be a conversion event in google analytics.
